title: Muscovado Medley
description: A tangy and juicy Australian dish featuring muscovado sugar in a poaching method suitable for a solo dinner.
instructions: Heat the water in a medium saucepan, adding the muscovado sugar and lime juice. Stir until fully dissolved.
Gently simmer for about 10 minutes to reduce slightly.
Add the lemons and mint leaves. Simmer for another 2-3 minutes.
Gradually add the pineapple slices to the poaching mixture, ensuring they float on top of the liquid.
Simmer gently for a further 5-7 minutes or until the pineapple is tender but still has some texture.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
